summary: Tested Telegram Cash Bot webhook functionality. Fixed critical bug in models.py where 'telegram_cash' source was not allowed. All 20 backend tests pass, all frontend UI elements verified.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly after data loads

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook handles callback_query for direction selection (returns ok:true)
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook requires direction selection before recording transaction
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook parses '1000 Антон зп' as expense with amount 1000
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook parses '+5000 продажа' as income with amount 5000
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook handles empty message gracefully
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook handles update without message gracefully
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook handles invalid transaction format gracefully
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook parses slash separator format (1000/ Антон Ск)
Backend: GET /api/telegram/webhook-info returns webhook status with auth
Backend: GET /api/telegram/bot-users returns connected users list with auth
Backend: POST /api/telegram/setup-webhook requires bot token to be configured (400)
Frontend: Connected users list shows 3 users (Test, TestUser, NewUser)
Frontend: Expense example '1000 Антон зп' in instructions
Frontend: Income example '+5000 продажа' in instructions
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: models.py Transaction.source field now includes 'telegram_cash' as allowed value
telegram_webhook.py: Well-structured webhook handler with proper command parsing and transaction creation
IntegrationsPage.jsx: Telegram Касса card properly implemented with all required UI elements and data-testids
seed_data_creation: Created test bot_users via webhook simulation (chat_id: 99999, 88888)

mocked_apis_list: Telegram API calls (sendMessage, answerCallbackQuery) fail silently since no real bot token is configured, but webhook handler processes and returns ok:true correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Telegram Cash Bot webhook fully tested. Key fix: Added 'telegram_cash' to Transaction.source Literal in models.py. All commands (/start, /help, /balance, /last, /direction) work. Transaction parsing for expense (1000 Антон зп) and income (+5000 продажа) works. Direction selection via callback_query works. Frontend IntegrationsPage shows Telegram Касса card with setup button and instructions. Test chat_ids used: 99999, 88888. Integrations page URL: /settings/integrations

bug_fix_applied.issue: Transaction.source field only accepted 'manual', 'import', 'telegram_bot', 'adesk_migration' but telegram_webhook.py was using 'telegram_cash'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'telegram_cash' to the Literal type: source: Literal['manual', 'import', 'telegram_bot', 'telegram_cash', 'adesk_migration']
